text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 18 

BRDR_STATE_IND 

LABEL: Border State Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: A code indicating that the provider location is outside of state boundaries. 

SHORT NAME: BRDR_STATE_IND 

LONG NAME: BRDR_STATE_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR Location 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
8 = State does not distinguish “border state providers”
